---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Drake
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem you want to solve. Ex. "I'm
always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Approaches

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you
have considered.

## Impact

Describe who would benefit from this feature and how it fits into Drake's
governance architecture.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or screenshots about the feature request
here.
